destinations.evidence: The port payload builder now checks the global build deadline before calling the fulfilled async and delivery-ready pool collection methods, returning empty vectors when the deadline has already elapsed.
destinations.snippet:
let fulfilled_async_entries = if Instant::now() > global_deadline { Vec::new() } else { ... };
let delivery_ready_async_entries = if Instant::now() > global_deadline { Vec::new() } else { ... };

equivalence_argument: Mapped in the port after the local parity fix: Phase B fulfilled async collection and Phase C delivery-ready collection are skipped before pool reads and settlement preparation when the payload build deadline has elapsed.

checked_queries: Phase B|Phase C|fulfilled async collection|delivery-ready settlement collection

related_but_insufficient_code.evidence: Before the local parity fix, the builder loaded fulfilled async entries without checking Instant::now() > global_deadline first. The local fix adds that pre-collection guard.
Before the local parity fix, the builder loaded delivery-ready entries without a pre-collection deadline guard. The local fix adds that guard.
The pool remains deadline-agnostic; the deadline policy is now enforced by the payload builder before calling pool collection.

notes: Mapped after local parity fix: later sequencing/execution checks remain, and Phase B/C collection now short-circuits before expensive pool reads and settlement preparation when the deadline is exceeded.
rationale: The primary merge adds explicit global_deadline checks before Phase B fulfilled async collection and Phase C delivery settlement collection, returning empty vectors with warnings if the deadline is exceeded. This result keeps the candidate as a distinct refined invariant because the bounded assignment packet does not contain a newer candidate that clearly supersedes it. Implementation-detail caveat: The phase labels and exact cutoff locations are builder-internal; the load-bearing behavior is avoiding deadline overruns while preserving later inclusion opportunities.
statement: If the payload build deadline is already exceeded, the builder should skip fulfilled async collection and delivery-ready settlement collection before doing their expensive work, leaving those transactions for a later block.
suggested_falsification_tests: Set a payload build deadline in the past, run payload building with fulfilled async and delivery-ready jobs available, and assert both collections are skipped and no settlement/origin entries from those phases are included in that payload.
summary: Phase B/C async collection is deadline-skipped before pool reads and settlement preparation.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Set a payload build deadline in the past, run payload building with fulfilled async and delivery-ready jobs available, and assert both collections are skipped and no settlement/origin entries from those phases are included in that payload.
title: Async Phase B/C collection can be skipped at deadline
